name: Silent Stalker's Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Chicken (3 to 3.5 pounds), cut into 8 pieces
8 Ounces sausage links, cooked and cut into 1/2-inch lengths
2 Carrots, cut into thick julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken pieces in a large kettle.
2. Add water and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat, add bay leaf, oregano, thyme, and salt and pepper to taste.
4. Simmer chicken, covered, for 25 minutes.
5. Add sausage, potatoes, carrots, onions, and Brussels sprouts.
6. Continue to cook at a rapid simmer, covered, for 20 minutes longer.
7. If the mixture begins to dry out, add some stock.
8. Remove chicken pieces and bone them.
9. Arrange chicken and rest of stew over a plate of kibble.
10. Pour enough stock over dish to make a rich gravy.
11. Serve at once.
Makes 2.5 to 3 quarts chicken stew.
